name: Adding theme modes does not clobber existing viewport modes
query: We already test at mobile and desktop viewports. Now we also want to test light and dark themes.
expected_behavior: Adds light and dark theme entries to the existing allModes object rather than replacing it
Does not remove or rename the existing mobile and desktop viewport modes
Shows the complete updated allModes with all four entries
success_criteria: The updated allModes includes both the original viewport modes and the new theme modes
The response does not suggest deleting or replacing modes.ts from scratch
